svg.text: Benchmark selected-peptide Jaccard overlap, initial labels=40
Darker cells indicate more redundant selected sets; values are mean Jaccard across replay runs.
Columns use abbreviations; rows show full strategy names.
Abbrev.: PE = predictive entropy; FQBC = family QBC; CDR = cluster-diverse; EMI = ensemble MI
HMI+D = hybrid MI + diverse; OED = OED logdet; SimPen = similarity-penalized mean
